title: A trustworthy evidence trail: replication, reproducibility, and transparency

objectives.statement: Distinguish preregistration, open methods, replication, computational reproducibility, and sensitivity analysis by the evidence question each addresses.
Evaluate what safeguard evidence raises or lowers confidence in a bounded claim without treating agreement, disagreement, or transparency as proof.
Design a transparent verification plan that preregisters decisions, supports responsible inspection, uses an informative new-data test, and examines plausible analytic alternatives.

scenes.title: When a result leaves a trail
Follow a seedling claim through four checks
Build a verification plan in a new setting

aiAssistance.disclosure: VSBDev (github:VSBDev) is accountable. The baseline science dossier contains ten accepted fragments from isolated, science-only Claude CLI calls; each machine-readable modelUsage included claude-fable-5 and also claude-haiku-4-5-20251001. The schema permits one author record per accountable principal, so the ten sessions are preserved separately—not collapsed into a false run—in ATTRIBUTION.md with every prompt digest. Those calls did not receive this repository, Premed, the graph outcome ID, or the packaging prompt. Opus-routed outputs were excluded before packaging. Material editorial and pedagogical assistance used Codex by OpenAI, model gpt-5.6-sol, Codex CLI 0.144.6, run 12858cbe-5233-4bc4-ae6c-25e3879f5a5e. Digests cover supplied material prompts, not hidden provider or system instructions.
